targets.query:
from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r._field == "bitrate")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "unit"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r._field == "cpu_payload")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "unit"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r.unit == "RX001" and r._field == "name")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r.unit == "RX001" and r._field == "ip")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r.unit == "RX001" and r._field == "persis")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r.unit == "RX001" and r._field == "resolution")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "home")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "kiloview" and r.unit == "RX001" and (r._field == "bitrate" or r._field == "cpu_payload" or r._field == "mem_used"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
